=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/effectGenUsesAdapter.ts(10,48): warning TS377027: The adapter of Effect.gen is not required anymore, it is now just an alias of pipe. effect(effectGenUsesAdapter)


==== /.src/effectGenUsesAdapter.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    export const isValid = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const x = yield* Effect.succeed(1)
      return x
    })
    
    // when the adapter usage is detected, warn
    export const isNotValid = Effect.gen(function*(_) {
                                                   ~
!!! warning TS377027: The adapter of Effect.gen is not required anymore, it is now just an alias of pipe. effect(effectGenUsesAdapter)
      const x = yield* Effect.succeed(1)
      return x
    })
